label: bauhaus_white_45deg
prompt: A handheld garment steamer with Bauhaus design philosophy. Based on the classic handheld steamer form factor: gun-grip handle at the back, flat steam plate head at the front angled downward, water tank integrated in the body. The exact same basic silhouette as existing handheld steamers on Amazon — NOT redesigned, just refined with Bauhaus aesthetics. Bauhaus treatment: pure geometric simplification — the body is reduced to intersecting cylinders and planes. Matte white body as the primary surface. One bold primary color accent: a Bauhaus red (Vermillion) circle on the side of the body, purely geometric, serving as the power button. The steam plate is brushed stainless steel, a clean flat rectangle with rounded corners. No decorative elements, no curves for the sake of curves. Every line has a purpose. Typography: small sans-serif product name in Bauhaus style font. Form follows function. The handle is ergonomically angled for natural wrist position when steaming hanging garments. Three-quarter hero shot, 45-degree angle. Pure white studio background. Professional product photography, photorealistic, 8K quality.

label: bauhaus_white_front
prompt: A handheld garment steamer with Bauhaus design. Classic handheld steamer form: gun-grip handle, front flat steam plate, integrated water tank. Bauhaus aesthetic: matte white body made of pure geometric volumes — cylinders and rectangles intersecting cleanly. One bold vermillion red circle as the power button. Brushed steel flat steam plate. Clean sans-serif typography. No ornament. Form follows function. Front view, eye level. White studio background. Product photography, photorealistic, 8K.

label: bauhaus_white_side
prompt: A handheld garment steamer with Bauhaus design. Side profile showing the classic steamer silhouette: angled steam head, gun-grip handle, body with water tank. Bauhaus treatment: pure geometric forms, matte white body, the handle angle follows ergonomic wrist position. A thin black line separates the steam head from body. One red circle accent visible. Brushed steel steam plate. Clean and purposeful. Side profile view, 90-degree angle. White studio background. Product photography, photorealistic, 8K.

label: bauhaus_black_45deg
prompt: A handheld garment steamer with Bauhaus design, dark variant. Same classic handheld steamer form factor as the white version. Matte black body with pure geometric volumes. One bold Bauhaus yellow (primary yellow) circle as the power button — the only color accent against the black. Brushed dark steel steam plate. Black power cord. Small white sans-serif typography. Severe, architectural, purposeful. The black makes the geometric purity even more striking. Three-quarter hero shot, 45-degree angle. White studio background. Product photography, photorealistic, 8K.

label: bauhaus_detail_red_button
prompt: Close-up detail shot of a matte white handheld garment steamer body showing the signature Bauhaus design element: a perfectly circular vermillion red power button, flush with the surface, geometric and bold against the pure white matte body. The circle is the only color on the entire product. A thin recessed line separates body panels. Small sans-serif text nearby. The surface texture is fine matte, industrial and precise. Macro photography, shallow depth of field, studio lighting, photorealistic, 8K.

label: bauhaus_detail_steamplate
prompt: Close-up detail of the steam plate on a Bauhaus-designed handheld garment steamer. The plate is a flat brushed stainless steel rectangle with precisely rounded corners. Evenly spaced steam holes arranged in a strict geometric grid pattern — not random, perfectly ordered rows and columns. The plate edge meets the white matte body with a thin precise gap line. The geometric precision of the hole pattern is the visual focus. Steam wisps rising. Macro photography, studio lighting, photorealistic, 8K.

label: bauhaus_primary_colors_lineup
prompt: Three handheld garment steamers in a row on white background, Bauhaus design. All the same classic steamer form with pure geometric bodies. LEFT: matte white body with red circle button. CENTER: matte black body with yellow circle button. RIGHT: matte light gray body with blue circle button. The three Bauhaus primary colors (red, yellow, blue) as the only accent on each otherwise monochrome steamer. Same geometric design language across all three. Equal spacing, catalog photography. Studio lighting, photorealistic, 8K.

label: bauhaus_in_use
prompt: A woman using a white Bauhaus-designed handheld garment steamer with a red circle button to steam a white dress shirt hanging on a minimalist black metal clothing rack. Her wrist is in a natural comfortable position — the gun-grip handle ergonomically supports vertical steaming. Modern minimalist apartment with white walls, concrete floor, one Bauhaus poster on the wall. The steamer's geometric purity fits the minimalist interior perfectly. Lifestyle photography, natural daylight, editorial quality, 8K, photorealistic.

label: bauhaus_poster_style
prompt: A product poster in Bauhaus graphic design style featuring a handheld garment steamer. The steamer is shown in profile silhouette, white body with red circle accent, against a cream background. Bold geometric composition with Bauhaus typography: product name in a heavy sans-serif font, arranged in an asymmetric grid layout with primary color blocks (red, yellow, blue) as graphic elements. Thin black rules and circles as compositional elements. The overall aesthetic references Herbert Bayer and Laszlo Moholy-Nagy poster designs. High quality graphic design, clean vector-like rendering, 8K.
